title: Petals – Run LLMs at home, BitTorrent-style
excerpt: Run large language models at home, BitTorrent‑style Generate text with Llama 3.1 (up to 405B), Mixtral (8x22B), Falcon (40B+) or BLOOM (176B) and fine‑tune them for your tasks — using a consumer-grade GPU or Google Colab…
content_html:
Run large language models at home, BitTorrent‑style

  • Generate text with Llama 3.1 (up to 405B), Mixtral (8x22B), Falcon (40B+) or BLOOM (176B) and fine‑tune them for your tasks — using a consumer-grade GPU or Google Colab.
  • You load a part of the model, then join a network of people serving its other parts. Single‑batch inference runs at up to 6 tokens/sec for Llama 2 (70B) and up to 4 tokens/sec for Falcon (180B) — enough for chatbots and interactive apps.
  • Beyond classic LLM APIs — you can employ any fine-tuning and sampling methods, execute custom paths through the model, or see its hidden states. You get the comforts of an API with the flexibility of PyTorch and 🤗 Transformers.

Top contributors right now:

We send updates once a few months. No spam.

We sent you an email to confirm your address. Click it and you're in!

Featured on:

This project is a part of the BigScience research workshop.

sentences.en: Generate text with Llama 3.1 (up to 405B), Mixtral (8x22B), Falcon (40B+) or BLOOM (176B) and fine‑tune them for your tasks — using a consumer-grade GPU or Google Colab.
sentences.zh: 使用 Llama 3.1（高达 405B）、Mixtral (8x22B)、Falcon (40B+) 或 BLOOM (176B) 生成文本，并使用消费级 GPU 或 Google Colab 针对您的任务对其进行微调。

blocks.html_en: • You load a part of the model, then join a network of people serving its other parts. Single‑batch inference runs at up to 6 tokens/sec for Llama 2 (70B) and up to 4 tokens/sec for Falcon (180B) — enough for chatbots and interactive apps.

sentences.zh: 您加载模型的一部分，然后加入为其其他部分提供服务的人员网络。

sentences.en: Single‑batch inference runs at up to 6 tokens/sec for Llama 2 (70B) and up to 4 tokens/sec for Falcon (180B) — enough for chatbots and interactive apps.
sentences.zh: Llama 2 (70B) 的单批次推理速度高达 6 个令牌/秒，Falcon (180B) 的单批次推理速度高达 4 个令牌/秒，足以满足聊天机器人和交互式应用程序的需要。

blocks.html_en: • Beyond classic LLM APIs — you can employ any fine-tuning and sampling methods, execute custom paths through the model, or see its hidden states. You get the comforts of an API with the flexibility of PyTorch and 🤗 Transformers.

sentences.en: Beyond classic LLM APIs — you can employ any fine-tuning and sampling methods, execute custom paths through the model, or see its hidden states.

sentences.en: You get the comforts of an API with the flexibility of PyTorch and 🤗 Transformers.
sentences.zh: 您可以享受 API 的便利以及 PyTorch 和 🤗 Transformers 的灵活性。

content_html_zh:
在家运行 BitTorrent 风格的大型语言模型

  • 使用 Llama 3.1（高达 405B）、Mixtral (8x22B)、Falcon (40B+) 或 BLOOM (176B) 生成文本，并使用消费级 GPU 或 Google Colab 针对您的任务对其进行微调。
  • 您加载模型的一部分，然后加入为其其他部分提供服务的人员网络。 Llama 2 (70B) 的单批次推理速度高达 6 个令牌/秒，Falcon (180B) 的单批次推理速度高达 4 个令牌/秒，足以满足聊天机器人和交互式应用程序的需要。
  • 除了经典的 LLM API 之外，您还可以采用任何微调和采样方法，通过模型执行自定义路径，或者查看其隐藏状态。 您可以享受 API 的便利以及 PyTorch 和 🤗 Transformers 的灵活性。

目前的主要贡献者：

加载中...

在 Discord 中或通过电子邮件关注开发：

我们每隔几个月发送一次更新。 没有垃圾邮件。

我们向您发送了一封电子邮件以确认您的地址。 点击它就可以了！

精选于：

该项目是 BigScience 研究研讨会的一部分。
